title: ChatGPT Chat Completion
description: Schema for an OpenAI Chat Completion response object. Represents a chat completion generated by the model, including the generated message choices, token usage, and metadata.

id.description: A unique identifier for the chat completion, prefixed with 'chatcmpl-'

object.description: The object type, which is always 'chat.completion'

created.description: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) of when the chat completion was created

model.description: The model used for the chat completion (e.g., 'gpt-4o-2024-08-06')

choices.description: A list of chat completion choices. Can be more than one if n is greater than 1.

usage.description: Usage statistics for the completion request

system_fingerprint.description: Fingerprint representing the backend configuration the model runs with. Can be used with the seed parameter to understand when backend changes have been made.

service_tier.description: The service tier used for processing the request

Choice.description: A single completion choice generated by the model

index.description: The index of the choice in the list of choices

message.description: A chat completion message generated by the model

finish_reason.description: The reason the model stopped generating tokens

logprobs.description: Log probability information for the choice

AssistantMessage.description: A message generated by the model in response to the conversation

role.description: The role of the author of this message

tool_calls.description: The tool calls generated by the model, such as function calls

refusal.description: The refusal message generated by the model if it declines to respond

audio.description: Audio response from the model when audio output is requested

ToolCall.description: A tool call generated by the model

id.description: The ID of the tool call

type.description: The type of the tool. Currently, only 'function' is supported.

function.description: The function that the model called

FunctionCall.description: The function that the model called

name.description: The name of the function to call

arguments.description: The arguments to call the function with, as generated by the model in JSON format

id.description: Unique identifier for the audio response

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp for when the audio expires

Logprobs.description: Log probability information for the completion

content.description: A list of message content tokens with log probability information

refusal.description: A list of refusal message tokens with log probability information

TokenLogprob.description: Token with its associated log probability information

logprob.description: The log probability of this token

bytes.description: A list of integers representing the UTF-8 bytes of the token

top_logprobs.description: List of the most likely tokens and their log probabilities at this position

Usage.description: Token usage statistics for the completion request

prompt_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the prompt

completion_tokens.description: Number of tokens in the generated completion

total_tokens.description: Total number of tokens used in the request (prompt + completion)

reasoning_tokens.description: Tokens generated by the model for internal reasoning

accepted_prediction_tokens.description: Tokens from a prediction that appeared in the completion

rejected_prediction_tokens.description: Tokens from a prediction that did not appear in the completion

audio_tokens.description: Number of audio tokens in the prompt

Message.description: A message in a chat conversation used as input to the model

role.description: The role of the message author

content.description: The contents of the message, either a string or an array of content parts

name.description: An optional name for the participant to differentiate between participants of the same role

tool_calls.description: Tool calls generated by the model (assistant messages only)

tool_call_id.description: The ID of the tool call this message responds to (tool messages only)

refusal.description: The refusal message generated by the model

ContentPart.description: A content part within a multi-part message, supporting text and image inputs

image_url.description: The image URL object (when type is 'image_url')

url.description: The URL of the image or base64-encoded image data

detail.description: The detail level of the image

input_audio.description: The audio input object (when type is 'input_audio')

format.description: The format of the encoded audio data

Tool.description: A tool available for the model to call

FunctionDefinition.description: Definition of a function that the model may call

description.description: A description of what the function does

parameters.description: The parameters the function accepts, described as a JSON Schema object

strict.description: Whether to enable strict schema adherence when generating the function call
